halfblock.h(3) Library Functions Manual halfblock.h(3)

NAME

halfblock.h

SYNOPSIS

Functions


char * rgb_to_truecolor_halfblocks_scalar (const uint8_t *rgb, int width, int height, int stride_bytes)
Convert RGB to truecolor half-blocks using scalar code. char * rgb_to_halfblocks_scalar (const uint8_t *rgb, int width, int height, int stride_bytes, const char *palette)
Convert RGB to monochrome (grayscale) half-blocks using scalar code. char * rgb_to_16color_halfblocks_scalar (const uint8_t *rgb, int width, int height, int stride_bytes, const char *palette)
Convert RGB to 16-color half-blocks using scalar code. char * rgb_to_256color_halfblocks_scalar (const uint8_t *rgb, int width, int height, int stride_bytes, const char *palette)
Convert RGB to 256-color half-blocks using scalar code.
